testcase.name: audit_withMessageAndParams_doesNotThrow
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-31T03:54:38.711631Z main WARN The use of package scanning to locate Log4j plugins is deprecated. Please remove the `packages` attribute from your configuration file. See https://logging.apache.org/log4j/2.x/faq.html#package-scanning for details. 20:54:38.747 [main] AUDIT com.wu.era.library.logger.WUCustomLoggerTest - audit message param1

testcase.name: audit_withMessageAndThrowable_doesNotThrow
